name: pUC19
description: High-copy cloning vector with lacZ-alpha blue-white selection, ampicillin resistance, and versatile MCS. Workhorse of molecular cloning.

metadata.note: Multiple cloning site: EcoRI, SacI, KpnI, AvaI, XmaI, SmaI, BamHI, XbaI, AccI, HincII, SalI, AccI, HincII, AccIII, SphI, PstI, HindIII

provenance.source: Motif curated reference data for common publicly documented cloning vectors
provenance.license: Included in the MIT-licensed Motif distribution as curated public reference data
provenance.notes: Bundled for workflow examples and software testing. Verify against an authoritative source before wet-lab use. No customer, sponsor, or private import data was used. Annotations are limited to valid ranges within the bundled sequence record.

name: pBR322
description: Classic E. coli cloning vector carrying ampicillin and tetracycline resistance markers. The ancestor of most modern E. coli vectors.

metadata.product: Rop protein, controls plasmid copy number

provenance.source: Motif curated reference data for common publicly documented cloning vectors
provenance.license: Included in the MIT-licensed Motif distribution as curated public reference data
provenance.notes: Bundled for workflow examples and software testing. Verify against an authoritative source before wet-lab use. No customer, sponsor, or private import data was used. Annotations are limited to valid ranges within the bundled sequence record.

name: pACYC184
description: Low-copy p15A-origin cloning vector record with tetracycline resistance annotations. Compatible with ColE1-based plasmids for dual-plasmid systems.

metadata.note: p15A origin of replication (~10-12 copies/cell); compatible with ColE1 plasmids

provenance.source: Motif curated reference data for common publicly documented cloning vectors

provenance.notes: Bundled for workflow examples and software testing. Verify against an authoritative source before wet-lab use. No customer, sponsor, or private import data was used. Annotations are limited to valid ranges within the bundled sequence record.

name: pBluescript SK(+)
description: Versatile phagemid-style cloning vector record with T3/T7 promoters flanking a large MCS, lacZ-alpha for blue-white screening, and ampicillin resistance.

metadata.note: Multiple cloning site (108 bp); 21 unique restriction sites

provenance.source: Motif curated reference data for common publicly documented cloning vectors
provenance.license: Included in the MIT-licensed Motif distribution as curated public reference data

name: pcDNA3.1(+)
description: Mammalian expression vector record with CMV promoter, BGH polyadenylation signal, SV40 ori, and NeoR/KanR selection cassette annotations.

metadata.note: Human cytomegalovirus (CMV) immediate early promoter/enhancer — strong constitutive expression in mammalian cells
Multiple cloning site: HindIII, KpnI, ApaI, XhoI, SalI, ClaI, EcoRV, EcoRI, PstI, SmaI, BamHI, SpeI, BstBI, NotI, XbaI, AflIII, PciI
SV40 origin of replication (requires large T antigen)

provenance.source: Motif curated reference data for common publicly documented cloning vectors

provenance.notes: Bundled for workflow examples and software testing. Verify against an authoritative source before wet-lab use. No customer, sponsor, or private import data was used. Annotations are limited to valid ranges within the bundled sequence record.

name: pET-28a(+)
description: Novagen pET-28 series T7lac bacterial expression vector. N-terminal His6-thrombin-T7 tag and optional C-terminal His6 tag flanking the MCS; kanamycin selection. Reading frame a.

provenance.source: Motif curated reference data for the Novagen pET-28a(+) T7lac expression vector. Nucleotide sequence obtained from the Addgene vector database (entry 2565) and cross-verified byte-for-byte against an independent repository (novoprolabs) as the same circular molecule, plus internally against the pET-28a/b/c(+) reading-frame trio.
provenance.license: Raw plasmid sequence is factual reference data, not subject to copyright; included in the MIT-licensed Motif distribution as curated public reference data. Feature annotations were generated independently by motif search, not copied from any annotated source.
provenance.notes: Bundled for workflow examples and software testing. Verify against an authoritative source before wet-lab use. Annotations are limited to valid ranges within the bundled sequence record (motif-located; KanR ORF confirmed by translation). No customer, sponsor, or private import data was used.

name: pET-28b(+)
description: Novagen pET-28 series T7lac bacterial expression vector. N-terminal His6-thrombin-T7 tag and optional C-terminal His6 tag flanking the MCS; kanamycin selection. Reading frame b (1-bp frameshift at the cloning site vs pET-28a(+)).

provenance.source: Motif curated reference data for the Novagen pET-28b(+) T7lac expression vector. name: pETDuet-1
description: Novagen pETDuet-1 dual-expression vector: two T7lac cassettes (MCS-1 + MCS-2) for co-expression of two target genes; ColE1 origin, ampicillin selection.

provenance.source: Motif curated reference data for the Novagen pETDuet-1 dual-expression vector. Nucleotide sequence obtained byte-exact from the Addgene vector database (entry 2659); the resistance-gene ORF was translation-verified to confirm vector identity (AmpR), and the shared T7lac architecture is consistent across the pET Duet family. The Addgene extraction method was independently validated byte-for-byte (pET-28b vs a second repository).
provenance.license: Raw plasmid sequence is factual reference data, not subject to copyright; included in the MIT-licensed Motif distribution as curated public reference data. Feature annotations were generated independently by motif search, not copied from any annotated source.
provenance.notes: Bundled for workflow examples and software testing. Verify against an authoritative source before wet-lab use.
